title: Extend expected-shot, diff, and parity validation to Atlas artifacts
description: Teach Sentinel's validation layers to understand Atlas-produced surface/scenario artifacts without reducing them back to legacy flat assumptions.
acceptanceCriteria: Expected-shot validation understands surface and scenario coverage
Diff and parity logic can compare Atlas-produced artifacts without losing scenario semantics
Legacy validation remains available during migration
Validation output makes it obvious whether a failure came from coverage drift, artifact mismatch, or adapter misuse
proofRequirements: tests or fixtures cover Atlas-style expected shots and comparisons
validation output examples exist in docs or snapshots
nonGoals: dropping legacy validation support before products migrate

notes.text: Execution started for Atlas-aware validation. The slice will add expected-artifact coverage, validation output, and scenario-preserving diff/parity units without breaking legacy catalog validation.

Completed Atlas-aware validation by adding expected-artifact builders, classified Atlas validation results, scenario-preserving diff/parity units, and catalog:validate Atlas mode with CLI/integration coverage. Full tests, build, and diff checks passed.
